languages.text: {n}Гемункул самодовольно улыбается — похоже, ваше представление ему польстило.{/n} "Вот, значит как? Этот кусок мяса для тебя так важен, что ты готов{mf||а} ползать на брюхе и унижаться, лишь бы его освободить? Это... забавно. Пожалуй, я отдам тебе его, чтобы потом отобрать снова и насладиться зрелищем еще раз".

{n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."
languages.original_text: {n}Гемункул самодовольно улыбается — похоже, ваше представление ему польстило.{/n} "Вот, значит как? languages.text: {n}Ein zufriedenes Lächeln huscht über das Gesicht des Haemonculus. Deine Unterwürfigkeit scheint ihm zu gefallen.{/n} "So ist es also? Dieses Stück Fleisch ist so wertvoll, dass Ihr Euch in den Staub werfen würdet, um seine Freilassung zu erwirken? Das ist wirklich ... unterhaltsam. Ich denke, ich werde Eurer Bitte entsprechen, allerdings nur, um das Spektakel eines Tages zu wiederholen."
languages.original_text: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein zufriedenes Lächeln huscht über das Gesicht des Haemonculus. Deine Unterwürfigkeit scheint ihm zu gefallen.{/n} "So ist es also? Dieses Stück Fleisch ist so wertvoll, dass Ihr Euch in den Staub werfen würdet, um seine Freilassung zu erwirken? Das ist wirklich ... unterhaltsam. Ich denke, ich werde Eurer Bitte entsprechen, allerdings nur, um das Spektakel eines Tages zu wiederholen."

languages.text: {n}Un sourire complaisant s'étire sur le visage de l'hémoncule. Il semble apprécier votre servilité.{/n} « Vous êtes donc {mf|désespéré|désespérée} à ce point ? Vous êtes {mf|prêt|prête} à vous abaisser plus bas que tout pour le libérer ? Tout ceci est pour le moins... distrayant. Je vais accéder à votre demande, mais simplement pour avoir le plaisir de vous reprendre ce misérable plus tard. Ainsi, je pourrai assister une nouvelle fois à ce spectacle. »
languages.original_text: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un sourire complaisant s'étire sur le visage de l'hémoncule. Il semble apprécier votre servilité.{/n} « Vous êtes donc {mf|désespéré|désespérée} à ce point ? Vous êtes {mf|prêt|prête} à vous abaisser plus bas que tout pour le libérer ? Tout ceci est pour le moins... distrayant. Je vais accéder à votre demande, mais simplement pour avoir le plaisir de vous reprendre ce misérable plus tard. Ainsi, je pourrai assister une nouvelle fois à ce spectacle. »

languages.text: {n}Una sonrisa satisfecha atraviesa el rostro del Hemónculo. Tu sumisión le resulta muy agradable.{/n} «Conque así son las cosas. ¿Valoras tanto este despojo como para arrastrarte en un intento de conseguir su libertad? Es... entretenido. Creo que te concederé lo que pides, aunque solo sea para recuperarlo más adelante y disfrutar otra vez de este espectáculo».
languages.original_text: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."

Tu sumisión le resulta muy agradable.{/n} «Conque así son las cosas. ¿Valoras tanto este despojo como para arrastrarte en un intento de conseguir su libertad? Es... entretenido. Creo que te concederé lo que pides, aunque solo sea para recuperarlo más adelante y disfrutar otra vez de este espectáculo».

languages.text: {n}Haimonkulus'un yüzünde kendini beğenmiş bir gülümseme beliriyor. İtaatkârlığın onu gözle görülür şekilde memnun ediyor.{/n} "Demek öyle... Bu et parçası o kadar değerli ki serbest kalması için kendini çamurda süründürüyorsun. Gerçekten... Eğlendirici. Onu daha sonra geri almak ve bu manzarayı bir kez daha görmek için dileğini yerine getireceğim."
languages.original_text: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."

traits.locale_text: {n}Haimonkulus'un yüzünde kendini beğenmiş bir gülümseme beliriyor. İtaatkârlığın onu gözle görülür şekilde memnun ediyor.{/n} "Demek öyle... Bu et parçası o kadar değerli ki serbest kalması için kendini çamurda süründürüyorsun. Gerçekten... Eğlendirici. Onu daha sonra geri almak ve bu manzarayı bir kez daha görmek için dileğini yerine getireceğim."

languages.text: {n}血伶人的脸上浮起一抹得意的笑，他显然对你的俯首听命很是满意。{/n}“哦？原来如此？这团烂肉竟然如此宝贵，值得你趴在地上求我放了他？真是……有趣。我可以答应你的请求，但这只是为了日后把他再抓回来，再欣赏一遍这出好戏。”
languages.original_text: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."

traits.locale_text: {n}血伶人的脸上浮起一抹得意的笑，他显然对你的俯首听命很是满意。{/n}“哦？原来如此？这团烂肉竟然如此宝贵，值得你趴在地上求我放了他？真是……有趣。我可以答应你的请求，但这只是为了日后把他再抓回来，再欣赏一遍这出好戏。”

languages.text: {n}満ち足りた笑みがハエモンクルスの顔に浮かぶ。あなたの卑屈さに、彼は明らかに満足している。{/n}「ほう、そういうことか？ この肉切れに、貴様が泥の中で這いつくばってまで解放を勝ち取ろうとするほどの価値があるとはな。実に……愉快だ。貴様の願いを聞き入れてやろう。後でこいつを取り戻し、この見物をもう一度味わう楽しみのためだけにな」
languages.original_text: {n}A complacent smile plays across the Haemonculus's face. He is visibly pleased by your subservience.{/n} "So, that is how it is? This scrap of flesh is of such value that you would grovel in the dirt to secure his release? Truly... entertaining. I think I will grant your request, purely for the pleasure of reclaiming him later and savouring the spectacle once more."

traits.locale_text: {n}満ち足りた笑みがハエモンクルスの顔に浮かぶ。あなたの卑屈さに、彼は明らかに満足している。{/n}「ほう、そういうことか？ この肉切れに、貴様が泥の中で這いつくばってまで解放を勝ち取ろうとするほどの価値があるとはな。実に……愉快だ。貴様の願いを聞き入れてやろう。後でこいつを取り戻し、この見物をもう一度味わう楽しみのためだけにな」
